entries.title: ZUCERO
entries.summary: A heritage-led sweetener brand translated into a cohesive editorial website and responsive digital experience.
entries.role: Information architecture, narrative structure, editorial interface design, responsive front-end development and video integration.
entries.imageAlt: ZUCERO website hero presenting sweetness as a ritual through an immersive editorial experience

entries.title: SQUARGRAPH™ Brand System
entries.summary: A self-initiated identity and digital system designed to hold one strategic idea across the studio's public touchpoints.
entries.role: Brand direction, identity logic, messaging architecture, website direction and implementation.
entries.imageAlt: SQUARGRAPH brand system and visual identity

entries.title: Perception, in Motion
entries.summary: A studio brand film that turns the idea of deliberate perception into a concise moving narrative.
entries.role: Creative direction, narrative system and brand communication.
entries.imageAlt: Still from the SQUARGRAPH brand film Perception, in Motion
entries.videoTitle: SQUARGRAPH brand film, Perception, in Motion

entries.title: Project Direction
entries.summary: A guided requirement experience that translates unclear business problems into connected capability direction.
entries.role: Product strategy, UX architecture, interface design, recommendation logic and implementation.
entries.imageAlt: Browser-framed view of the SQUARGRAPH Project Direction experience

entries.title: Growth Ecosystem Partner Experience
entries.summary: A focused application journey for specialists and studios joining a controlled delivery ecosystem.
entries.role: Experience strategy, interface system, form architecture and implementation.
entries.imageAlt: Connected specialist teams working within a shared growth system

entries.title: Integrated Automotive Mandate
entries.summary: Integrated brand communication across fast-moving automotive launches, digital campaigns, content and public-facing moments.
entries.role: Led or contributed while working with INNOCEAN Worldwide India on the Hyundai India mandate.
entries.imageAlt: Editorial campaign system board representing integrated automotive work from the founder's previous experience

entries.title: National-Scale Campaign Systems
entries.summary: Campaign environments where strategy, content, creators, PR, production, stakeholders and reporting had to move together.
entries.role: Led or contributed before the establishment of SQUARGRAPH™.
entries.imageAlt: Editorial operating board representing national-scale campaign systems from the founder's previous experience
